useEffect, useRef, useState } from \"preact/hooks\";\nimport { html } from \"../dom\";\n\nexport interface VerticalSliderProps {\n    class?: string,\n    minValue: number,\n    maxValue: number,\n    initialValue: number,\n    onChange: (value: number) => void,\n    icon: JSX.Element,\n    registerListner: (fn: (value: number) => void) => void,\n    removeListener: (fn: (value: number) => void) => void,\n};\n\nexport function VerticalSlider(props: VerticalSliderProps) {\n    const { minValue, maxValue, initialValue, onChange, icon } = props;\n    const valueRange = maxValue - minValue;\n    const sliderRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n    const [value, setValue] = useState(initialValue);\n    const [opacity, setOpacity] = useState(0);\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        if (sliderRef === null || sliderRef.current === null) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        let started = false;\n        const el = sliderRef.current;\n        const calcValue = (ev: PointerEvent) => {\n            const boundingRect = el.getBoundingClientRect();\n            const rawPercent = 1 - (ev.clientY - boundingRect.top) / boundingRect.height;\n            const precent = Math.max(Math.min(1, rawPercent), 0);\n            return precent * valueRange;\n        };\n        const onStart = (ev: PointerEvent) => {\n            if (ev.target !== el || started) {\n                return;\n            }\n            started = true;\n            setOpacity(80);\n\n            setValue(calcValue(ev));\n            ev.stopPropagation();\n            ev.preventDefault();\n        };\n        const onMove = (ev: PointerEvent) => {\n            if (!started) {\n                return;\n            }\n\n            const newValue = calcValue(ev);\n            setValue(newValue);\n            onChange(newValue);\n            ev.stopPropagation();\n            ev.preventDefault();\n        };\n        const onEnd = (ev: PointerEvent) => {\n            if (!started) {\n                return;\n            }\n\n            started = false;\n            setOpacity(0);\n            const newValue = calcValue(ev);\n            setValue(newValue);\n            onChange(newValue);\n            ev.stopPropagation();\n            ev.preventDefault();\n        };\n\n        window.addEventListener(\"pointerdown\", onStart);\n        window.addEventListener(\"pointermove\", onMove);\n        window.addEventListener(\"pointerup\", onEnd);\n        window.addEventListener(\"pointercancel\", onEnd);\n        props.registerListner(setValue);\n\n        return () => {\n            props.removeListener(setValue);\n            window.removeEventListener(\"pointerdown\", onStart);\n            window.removeEventListener(\"pointermove\", onMove);\n            window.removeEventListener(\"pointerup\", onEnd);\n            window.removeEventListener(\"pointercancel\", onEnd);\n        };\n    }, [sliderRef]);\n\n    const top = (100 - Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Math.round(value / valueRange * 100)))) + \"%\";\n\n    return html`\n        <div class=\"h-full flex flex-col py-0 items-center\">\n            <div class=\"bg-gray-200 rounded flex items-center justify-center h-6 w-5 mt-4 text-gray-600\">\n                <${icon} class=\"h-4 w-4\" />\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"cursor-pointer flex-grow py-4 px-2\" ref=${sliderRef}>\n                <div class=${\"pointer-events-none relative sensitivity rounded-2xl bg-gray-400 w-2 \" +\n                    \"h-full\" + (props.class ? props.class : \"\")}>\n               <div class=\"bg-green-100 ml-2 py-1 px-2 rounded z-50 ${\"opacity-\" + opacity}\">\n                            ${Math.round((minValue + value) * 10) / 10}\n                        </div>\n                    </div>    \n                </div>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n    `;\n}\n","import { Props } from \"../player-app\";\nimport { html } from \"../dom\";\nimport { next of className) {\n            el.classList.add(next);\n        }\n    }\n    if (innerHtml !== undefined) {\n        el.innerHTML = innerHtml;\n    }\n    return el;\n}\n\nexport function click(el: HTMLElement, callbackFn: (el: HTMLElement) => void): void {\n    for (const next of emulatorsUi.dom.pointers.bind.enders) {\n        el.addEventListener(next, () => {\n            if downloadFile(data: Uint8Array, fileName: string, mimeType: string): void {\n    const blob = new Blob([data], {\n        type: mimeType,\n    });\n\n    if (downloadFileUrl !== null) {\n        window.URL.revokeObjectURL(downloadFileUrl);\n    }\n    downloadFileUrl = window.URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n    const a = document.createElement(\"a\");\n    a.href = downloadFileUrl;\n    a.download = fileName;\n    a.style.display = \"none\";\n\n    document.body.appendChild(a);\n    a.click();\n    a.remove();\n}\n","/* eslint-disable no-lone-blocks */\n\nimport { TransportLayer, ClientMessage, MessageHandler, ServerMessage } from \"emulators/dist/types/protocol/protocol\";\nimport * as base64 from \"base64-js\";\n\nexport interface Hardware {\n    readConfig(): string;\n    sendMessage(payload: string): void;\n    addKey(key: number, pressed: number, timeMs: number): void;\n    mouseMove(x: number, y: number, relative: boolean, timeMs: number): void;\n    mouseButton(button: number, pressed: number, timeMs: number): void;\n    getFramePayload(): string;\n\n    createFile(path: string): string;\n    appendFile(blob: string): string;\n    closeFile(): string;\n}\n\nconst textDecoder = new TextDecoder();\n\nclass HardwareTransportLayer implements TransportLayer {\n    sessionId: string = Date.now() + \"\";\n    hardware: Hardware;\n\n\n    private alive = true;\n    private frameWidth = 0;\n    private frameHeight = 0;\n\n    private handler: MessageHandler = () => {/**/};\n\n    constructor(realtime: Hardware) {\n        this.hardware = realtime;\n    }\n\n    callMain() {\n        this.hardware.sendMessage(\"wc-install\\n\" + this.sessionId + \"\\n\");\n        requestAnimationFrame(this.update.bind(this));\n    }\n\n    // eslint-disable-next-line\n    async sendMessageToServer(name: ClientMessage, props?: { [key: string]: any; }) {\n        if (props === undefined || props?.sessionId !== this.sessionId) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        switch (name) {\n            case \"wc-run\": {\n                let errorMessage = writeFile(this.hardware, \"bundle_0.zip\", props.bundles[0]);\n\n                if (errorMessage.length > 0) {\n                    console.error(errorMessage);\n                    throw new Error(errorMessage);\n                }\n\n                if (props.bundles[1] !== undefined) {\n                    errorMessage = writeFile(this.hardware, \"bundle_1.zip\", props.bundles[1]);\n                    if (errorMessage.length > 0) {\n                        console.error(errorMessage);\n                        throw new Error(errorMessage);\n                    }\n                }\n\n                const payload = \"wc-run\\n\";\n                this.hardware.sendMessage(payload);\n            } break;\n            case \"wc-add-key\": {\n                this.hardware.addKey(props.key, props.pressed ? 1 : 0, props.timeMs);\n            } break;\n            case \"wc-pause\": {\n                this.hardware.sendMessage(\"wc-pause\\n\" + this.sessionId + \"\\n\");\n            } break;\n            case \"wc-resume\": {\n                this.hardware.sendMessage(\"wc-resume\\n\" + this.sessionId + \"\\n\");\n            } break;\n            case \"wc-mute\": {\n                this.hardware.sendMessage(\"wc-mute\\n\" + this.sessionId + \"\\n\");\n            } break;\n            case \"wc-unmute\": {\n                this.hardware.sendMessage(\"wc-unmute\\n\" + this.sessionId + \"\\n\");\n            } break;\n            case \"wc-exit\": {\n                this.alive = false;\n                this.hardware.sendMessage(\"wc-exit\\n\" + this.sessionId + \"\\n\");\n            } break;\n            case \"wc-mouse-move\": {\n                this.hardware.mouseMove(props.x, props.y, props.relative, props.timeMs);\n            } break;\n            case \"wc-mouse-button\": {\n                this.hardware.mouseButton(props.button, props.pressed ? 1 : 0, props.timeMs);\n            } break;\n            case \"wc-pack-fs-to-bundle\": {\n                this.hardware.sendMessage(\"wc-pack-fs-to-bundle\\n\" + this.sessionId + \"\\n\");\n            } break;\n            case \"wc-connect\": {\n                this.hardware.sendMessage(\"wc-connect\\n\" + this.sessionId + \"\\n\" +\n                    props.networkType + \"\\n\" +\n                    props.address.replace(\"ws://\", \"\").replace(\"wss://\", \"\") + \"\\n\" +\n                    (props.port - 1) + \"\\n\");\n            } break;\n            case \"wc-disconnect\": {\n                this.hardware.sendMessage(\"wc-disconnect\\n\" + this.sessionId + \"\\n\" +\n                    props.networkType + \"\\n\");\n            } break;\n            default: {\n                console.log(\"Unhandled client message (wc):\", name, props);\n            } break;\n        }\n    }\n\n    initMessageHandler(handler: MessageHandler) {\n        this.handler = handler;\n    }\n\n    exit() {\n        this.alive = false;\n    }\n\n    // eslint-disable-next-line\n    async onServerMessage(name: string, optProps?: { [key: string]: any }) {\n        const props = optProps || {};\n        switch (name) {\n            case \"ws-server-ready\": {\n                const config = this.hardware.readConfig();\n                this.handler(\"ws-config\", { sessionId: this.sessionId, content: config });\n                // delay ws-server-ready until ws-sound-init\n            } break;\n            case \"ws-sound-init\": {\n                this.handler(name, props);\n                this.handler(\"ws-server-ready\", { sessionId: this.sessionId });\n            } break;\n            case \"ws-frame-set-size\": {\n                this.frameWidth = props.width;\n                this.frameHeight = props.height;\n                this.handler(name, props);\n            } break;\n            case \"ws-sound-push\": {\n                this.handler(name, props);\n            } break;\n            case \"ws-update-lines\": {\n                this.handler(name, props);\n            } break;\n            case \"ws-persist\": {\n                props.bundle = decode(props.bundle);\n                this.handler(name, props);\n            } break;\n            case \"ws-log\":\n            case \"ws-warn\":\n            case \"ws-err\":\n            case \"ws-stdout\": {\n                if (props.message !== undefined && props.message !== null && props.message.length > 0) {\n                    props.message = textDecoder.decode(decode(props.message));\n                }\n                this.handler(name, props);\n            } break;\n            default: {\n                this.handler(name as ServerMessage, props);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    private update() {\n        if (this.alive) {\n            requestAnimationFrame(this.update.bind(this));\n        }\n        this.updateFrame();\n    }\n\n    private updateFrame() {\n        if (this.frameWidth === 0 || this.frameHeight === 0) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        const framePayload = this.hardware.getFramePayload();\n        if (framePayload.length === 0) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        const framePayloadU8 = decode(framePayload);\n        if (framePayloadU8.length === 0) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        const lines: {\n            start: number,\n            heapu8: Uint8Array,\n        }[] = [];\n\n        const pitch = this.frameWidth * 3;\n        let offset = this.frameHeight;\n        let upBorder = -1;\n        for (let line = 0; line < this.frameHeight; ++line) {\n            const lastLine = line === this.frameHeight - 1;\n\n\n            if (framePayloadU8[line] === 1 && upBorder === -1) {\n                upBorder = line;\n            } else if ((lastLine || framePayloadU8[line] === 0) && upBorder !== -1) {\n                const downBorder = framePayloadU8[line] === 1 ? line : line - 1;\n                const range = (downBorder - upBorder + 1) * pitch;\n                const heapu8 = framePayloadU8.slice(offset, offset + range);\n                lines.push({\n                    start: upBorder,\n                    heapu8,\n                });\n                offset += range;\n                upBorder = -1;\n            }\n        }\n\n        this.handler(\"ws-update-lines\", {\n            sessionId: this.sessionId,\n            lines,\n        });\n    }\n}\n\nexport class HardwareTransportLayerFactory {\n    // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any\n    private serverMessageHandler: (name: string, props?: { [key: string]: any }) => void = () => {/**/};\n\n    constructor() {\n        // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any\n        (window as any).serverMessage = (payload: string | { name: string }) => {\n            if (typeof payload === \"string\") {\n                const json = \"{\" + textDecoder.decode(decode(payload)).slice(0, -1) + \"}\";\n                try {\n                    const data = JSON.parse(json);\n                    this.serverMessageHandler(data.name, data);\n                } catch (e) {\n                    console.error(\"Can't parse\", json, e);\n                    throw e;\n                }\n            } else {\n                this.serverMessageHandler(payload.name, payload);\n            }\n        };\n\n        this.createTransportLayer = this.createTransportLayer.bind(this);\n    }\n\n    createTransportLayer(realtime: Hardware): TransportLayer {\n        const transport = new HardwareTransportLayer(realtime);\n        this.serverMessageHandler = transport.onServerMessage.bind(transport);\n        transport.callMain();\n        return transport;\n    }\n}\n\nexport const hardwareTransportLayerFactory = new HardwareTransportLayerFactory();\n\nfunction writeFile(hardware: Hardware, path: string, payload: Uint8Array): string {\n    if ((hardware as any).writeFile !== undefined) {\n        return (hardware as any).writeFile(path, encode(payload));\n    }\n\n    const bufferSize = 4 * 1024 * 1024; // 4 mb\n\n    let error = hardware.createFile(path);\n    if (error.length > 0) {\n        return error;\n    }\n\n    let cursor = 0;\n    while (cursor < payload.length) {\n        const size = Math.min(bufferSize, payload.length - cursor);\n        const chunk = payload.subarray(cursor, cursor + size);\n        error = hardware.appendFile(encode(chunk));\n        if (error.length > 0) {\n            return error;\n        }\n        cursor += size;\n    }\n\n    error = hardware.closeFile();\n    return error;\n}\n\nfunction decode(input: string): Uint8Array {\n    return base64.toByteArray(input);\n}\n\nfunction encode(input: Uint8Array): string {\n    return base64.fromByteArray(input);\n}\n","/* eslint-disable max-len */\n\nimport { html } from \"./dom\";\n\nconst XCircle = (props: { class: string }) => html`\n    <svg fill=\"none\" class=${props.class} if (worker) {
    onmessage = (e) => {
        const data = e.data;
        if (data === undefined) {
            return;
        }

        if (data.name === "wc-install") {
            const sessionId = data.props.sessionId;
            const module = {};

            if (data.props.module !== undefined) {
                const wasmModule = data.props.module;
                const instantiateWasm = (info, receiveInstance) => {
                    info.env = info.env || {};
                    WebAssembly.instantiate(wasmModule, info)
                        .then((instance) => receiveInstance(instance, wasmModule));
                    return; // no-return
                };

                module.instantiateWasm = instantiateWasm;
            }

            module.onRuntimeInitialized = () => {
                module.callMain([sessionId]);
            };

            new WDOSBOX(module);
            return;
        }
    };
}

--- projeto.py
import os
import argparse
from fnmatch import fnmatch

def gitignore_matches(pattern: str, rel_path: str) -> bool:
    """
    Aproximação simples (mas funcional) para matching de .gitignore.
    Funciona bem para padrões comuns em projetos Node.js/Flask (node_modules, dist/, *.log, .env, etc.).
    """
    rel_path = rel_path.replace(os.sep, "/")
    pattern = pattern.strip()
    if not pattern:
        return False

    # Remove leading / (padrão raiz)
    if pattern.startswith("/"):
        pattern = pattern[1:]

    # Se termina com / é padrão de diretório
    is_dir_pattern = pattern.endswith("/")
    if is_dir_pattern:
        pattern = pattern[:-1]

    # Caso 1: padrão sem / → match no nome do arquivo/diretório (recursivo)
    if "/" not in pattern:
        basename = os.path.basename(rel_path)
        if fnmatch(basename, pattern):
            return True
        return False

    # Caso 2: padrão com / → match no caminho relativo completo
    return (
        fnmatch(rel_path, pattern)
        or fnmatch(rel_path + "/", pattern)
        or fnmatch("/" + rel_path, pattern)
    )


def load_gitignore_patterns(root_dir: str):
    """Carrega apenas os padrões de ignore do .gitignore da raiz (padrões ! são tratados na verificação)."""
    gitignore_path = os.path.join(root_dir, ".gitignore")
    if not os.path.exists(gitignore_path):
        return []

    patterns = []
    with open(gitignore_path, "r", encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore") as f:
        for line in f:
            line = line.strip()
            if line and not line.startswith("#"):
                patterns.append(line)
    return patterns


def is_ignored(rel_path: str, patterns: list) -> bool:
    """Verifica se o caminho deve ser ignorado respeitando a ordem e os ! do .gitignore."""
    if not patterns:
        return False

    last_match_ignore = None
    for pattern in patterns:
        if pattern.startswith("!"):
            p = pattern[1:].strip()
            ignore_this = False
        else:
            p = pattern.strip()
            ignore_this = True

        if p and gitignore_matches(p, rel_path):
            last_match_ignore = ignore_this

    return last_match_ignore if last_match_ignore is not None else False


def build_tree_and_files(root_dir: str, gitignore_patterns: list):
    """Gera a árvore (apenas itens não ignorados) e lista de arquivos para concatenar."""
    tree_lines = []
    files_to_concat = []  # (rel_path, full_path)

    def walker(current_dir: str, prefix: str = ""):
        try:
            entries = sorted(os.listdir(current_dir))
        except OSError:
            return

        filtered_entries = []
        for entry in entries:
            if entry == ".git":
                continue  # sempre ignora .git

            full_path = os.path.join(current_dir, entry)
            rel_path = os.path.relpath(full_path, root_dir)

            if is_ignored(rel_path, gitignore_patterns):
                continue

            filtered_entries.append(entry)

        # Gera a árvore e coleta arquivos
        for i, entry in enumerate(filtered_entries):
            is_last = i == len(filtered_entries) - 1
            connector = "└── " if is_last else "├── "
            tree_lines.append(prefix + connector + entry)

            full_path = os.path.join(current_dir, entry)
            rel_path = os.path.relpath(full_path, root_dir)

            if os.path.isdir(full_path):
                new_prefix = prefix + ("    " if is_last else "│   ")
                walker(full_path, new_prefix)
            else:
                # Arquivo → será concatenado (tentaremos ler como texto depois)
                files_to_concat.append((rel_path, full_path))

    walker(root_dir)
    tree_str = ".\n" + "\n".join(tree_lines)
    return tree_str, files_to_concat


def concatenate_project(project_dir: str, output_file: str):
    """Função principal: gera árvore + conteúdo dos arquivos."""
    print(f"Processando projeto: {project_dir}")
    
    gitignore_patterns = load_gitignore_patterns(project_dir)
    if gitignore_patterns:
        print(f"✅ .gitignore encontrado ({len(gitignore_patterns)} padrões). Respeitando ignores...")

    tree_str, files_to_concat = build_tree_and_files(project_dir, gitignore_patterns)

    with open(output_file, "w", encoding="utf-8") as out:
        out.write("=== ESTRUTURA DO PROJETO (TREE) ===\n\n")
        out.write(tree_str)
        out.write("\n\n")
        out.write("=== CONTEÚDO DOS ARQUIVOS ===\n\n")

        for rel_path, full_path in files_to_concat:
            out.write(f"--- {rel_path}\n")
            try:
                with open(full_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                    content = f.read()
                out.write(content)
                out.write("\n\n")
            except UnicodeDecodeError:
                out.write("[Arquivo binário ou codificação inválida - ignorado]\n\n")
            except Exception as e:
                out.write(f"[Erro ao ler o arquivo: {e}]\n\n")

    print(f"✅ Pronto! Arquivo gerado em:")
    print(f"   {os.path.abspath(output_file)}")
    print(f"   Total de arquivos concatenados: {len(files_to_concat)}")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
        description="Concatena todo o código de um projeto em um único arquivo TXT (respeita .gitignore e ignora .git)"
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "project_dir",
        nargs="?",
        default=".",
        help="Diretório do projeto (padrão: pasta atual)",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "-o",
        "--output",
        default=None,
        help="Nome do arquivo de saída (padrão: project_concatenated.txt dentro do projeto)",
    )

    args = parser.parse_args()

    root = os.path.abspath(args.project_dir)

    if args.output:
        output_file = os.path.abspath(args.output)
    else:
        output_file = os.path.join(root, "projeto.txt")

    concatenate_project(root, output_file)

--- sobe.bat
@echo off
cls
echo --------------------------------------------
echo Adicionando todos os arquivos... 
git add . 
echo .
echo --------------------------------------------
echo Criando o commit -M %1
git commit -M %1
rem git commit -M %1
echo .
echo --------------------------------------------
echo Empurrando as alterações para o GitHub
git push 
rem git push -u origin main 
echo --------------------------------------------
echo .
